title: TeachableTransaction
description: A financial transaction record for a course purchase on a Teachable school.

user_id.description: ID of the user who made the purchase.

pricing_plan_id.description: ID of the pricing plan purchased.

sale_id.description: ID of the associated sale record.

created_at.description: Datetime the transaction record was created.

charge.description: Amount charged in USD in the smallest currency unit (cents).

final_price.description: Final price in the currency of choice in the smallest unit.

tax_charge.description: Tax amount charged in the smallest currency unit.

revenue.description: Net revenue in USD in the smallest currency unit.

has_chargeback.description: Whether the transaction has a chargeback.

chargeback_fee.description: Chargeback fee amount in smallest currency unit.

affiliate_id.description: ID of the affiliate who referred the sale, if applicable.

affiliate_fees.description: Affiliate commission fees in smallest currency unit.

author_fees.description: Author fee amount in smallest currency unit.

coupon_id.description: ID of the coupon used, if applicable.

refunded_at.description: Datetime the transaction was refunded, if applicable.

amount_refunded.description: Amount refunded in smallest currency unit.
